mapper.update: update base_entrust_relationship set default_flag= #{bean.defaultFlag}, purchase_sale_org_id=#{bean.saleOrgId}, stock_org_id=#{bean.stockOrgId}, pay_receive_org_id=#{bean.receiveOrgId}, account_org_id=#{bean.receiveOrgId}, settment_org_id=#{bean.settleOrgId}, remark = #{bean.remark}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, modified_name = #{bean.modifiedName}, modified_date = #{bean.modifiedDate} where id = #{bean.id}
mapper.select: select id as id, group_id as groupId, entrust_source as entrustSource, entrust_source_id as entrustSourceId, default_flag as defaultFlag, state as state, purchase_sale_org_id as saleOrgId, stock_org_id as stockOrgId, pay_receive_org_id as receiveOrgId, settment_org_id as settleOrgId FROM base_entrust_relationship WHERE id = #{entruestId} and entrust_type = 3 and entrust_range= 2

select id as id, default_flag as defaultFlag, state as state, purchase_sale_org_id as saleOrgId, stock_org_id as stockOrgId, pay_receive_org_id as receiveOrgId, settment_org_id as settleOrgId FROM base_entrust_relationship WHERE purchase_sale_org_id = #{saleOrgId} and entrust_type = 3 and entrust_range= 2 and deleted_flag=0
mapper.sql: group_id, entrust_range, entrust_type, entrust_source, entrust_source_id, default_flag, state, purchase_sale_org_id, stock_org_id, pay_receive_org_id, account_org_id, settment_org_id, remark, created_by, created_name, created_date
mapper.select: select id, purchase_sale_org_id, stock_org_id, pay_receive_org_id, settment_org_id, default_flag, state, ori_acc_code, remark, created_by, created_date, modified_by, modified_date from base_entrust_relationship
